differential_diagnoses: Septic shock (Gram-negative, e.g., E. coli or Klebsiella)
next_steps: Dengue NS1 antigen and IgM/IgG serology
Repeated thick and thin blood smears for malaria
Full infectious disease workup including viral myocarditis panel (e.g., enterovirus, adenovirus PCR)
Urgent echocardiography to evaluate for worsening cardiac function/myocarditis
Send blood and urine cultures for specialized organisms (e.g., Salmonella, Leptospira)
Evaluate for Hemophagocytic Lymphohistiocytosis (HLH) given splenomegaly, pancytopenia, and clinical deterioration
